name: 05_metrics_contract_transport_dev_transport_nel
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_nel' AS schema_name,
  'utbl_kpi_assets' AS table_name,
  'MANAGED' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Construction Date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Construction Date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ChainageStart` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ChainageStart` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`X coordinate start` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`X coordinate start` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Y coordinate start` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Y coordinate start` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Z coordinate start` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Z coordinate start` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Data Date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Data Date` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Construction Date` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Construction Date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Construction Date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ChainageStart` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`ChainageStart` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ChainageStart` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`X coordinate start` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`X coordinate start` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`X coordinate start` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Y coordinate start` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Y coordinate start` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Y coordinate start` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Z coordinate start` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Z coordinate start` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Z coordinate start` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Data Date` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Data Date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Data Date` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'Construction Date|ChainageStart|X coordinate start|Y coordinate start|Z coordinate start|Data Date' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_nel`.`utbl_kpi_assets`
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_nel' AS schema_name,
  'utbl_kpi_work_orders' AS table_name,
  'MANAGED' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Anywhere Created` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Anywhere Created` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Target Start` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Target Start` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Target Finish` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Target Finish` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Actual Start` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Actual Start` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Actual Finish` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Actual Finish` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Finish No Later Than` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Finish No Later Than` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Reported Date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Reported Date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Occurrence Date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Occurrence Date` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Anywhere Created` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Anywhere Created` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Anywhere Created` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Target Start` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Target Start` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Target Start` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Target Finish` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Target Finish` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Target Finish` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Actual Start` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Actual Start` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Actual Start` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Actual Finish` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Actual Finish` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Actual Finish` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Finish No Later Than` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Finish No Later Than` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Finish No Later Than` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Reported Date` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Reported Date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Reported Date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Occurrence Date` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Occurrence Date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Occurrence Date` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'Anywhere Created|Target Start|Target Finish|Actual Start|Actual Finish|Finish No Later Than|Reported Date|Occurrence Date' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_nel`.`utbl_kpi_work_orders`
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_nel' AS schema_name,
  'utbl_ref_date_table' AS table_name,
  'MANAGED' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`LongDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`LongDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Last Day of Month` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Last Day of Month` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Week Commencing` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Week Commencing` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`DateKey` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`DateKey` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Date` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`LongDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`LongDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`LongDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Last Day of Month` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Last Day of Month` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Last Day of Month` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Week Commencing` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Week Commencing` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Week Commencing` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`DateKey` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`DateKey` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`DateKey` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'Date|LongDate|Last Day of Month|Week Commencing|DateKey' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_nel`.`utbl_ref_date_table`
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_nel' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_kpi_sys_av_devices' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Actual Start` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Actual Start` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Actual Finish` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Actual Finish` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`actual_start_timestamp` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`actual_start_timestamp` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`actual_finish_timestamp` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`actual_finish_timestamp` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`start_datekey` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`start_datekey` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Planned_Downtime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Planned_Downtime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Unplanned_Downtime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Unplanned_Downtime` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Actual Start` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Actual Start` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Actual Start` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Actual Finish` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Actual Finish` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Actual Finish` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`actual_start_timestamp` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`actual_start_timestamp` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`actual_start_timestamp` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`actual_finish_timestamp` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`actual_finish_timestamp` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`actual_finish_timestamp` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`start_datekey` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`start_datekey` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`start_datekey` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Planned_Downtime` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Planned_Downtime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Planned_Downtime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Unplanned_Downtime` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Unplanned_Downtime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Unplanned_Downtime` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'Actual Start|Actual Finish|actual_start_timestamp|actual_finish_timestamp|start_datekey|Planned_Downtime|Unplanned_Downtime' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_nel`.`uvw_kpi_sys_av_devices`

data_array: Construction Date|ChainageStart|X coordinate start|Y coordinate start|Z coordinate start|Data Date
Anywhere Created|Target Start|Target Finish|Actual Start|Actual Finish|Finish No Later Than|Reported Date|Occurrence Date
